character.name: Samuri
character.prompt: A 2D pixel art character of a samurai wearing red dragon-themed armor. The armor is bold and layered, with large shoulder plates and simple, angular shapes for clear readability. The helmet includes a traditional wide hat shape with a strong, clean silhouette. The armor features subtle dragon-inspired details, such as simple scale patterns and sharp accents, kept minimal for pixel clarity. The character has a single katana stored in a sheath (holster) at the waist, positioned clearly so it is visible in the silhouette. The body has a strong, balanced build. The design uses limited colors, strong contrast, and minimal shading, optimized for low-resolution pixel art and animation. Consistent proportions, front-facing sprite, no perspective distortion.
